clues.clue: This armored Sith Lord, once Anakin Skywalker, breathes through a life-support mask.
This dark lord of Mordor is bound to the One Ring he forged.
In 'Dune,' this grotesque, floating Baron schemes against House Atreides.
In 'The Matrix,' this relentless suited program hunts Neo.
In 'Blade Runner,' this replicant leader delivers the 'tears in rain' monologue.
Each side in standard chess begins with this many pawns.
Classic Monopoly tokens include the top hat, thimble and this Scottie figure.
A standard playing-card deck is divided into this many suits.
In backgammon, each player controls this many checkers.
A standard double-six domino set contains this many tiles.
This 1969 mission first landed humans on the Moon.
This reusable NASA spacecraft program flew from 1981 to 2011.
This space telescope, launched in 1990, was named for an American astronomer.
This 1970 mission survived an oxygen-tank explosion and the line 'Houston, we've had a problem.'
Landing via a 'sky crane' in 2012, this NASA rover explores Mars's Gale Crater.
The 'Gilligan's Island' theme says the crew set sail for a 'three-hour' this.
The 'Fresh Prince' theme says 'In west Philadelphia, born and' this.
The 'Flintstones' theme promises 'we'll have a gay old' this.
'The Brady Bunch' theme calls it 'the story of a lovely' this.
'The Greatest American Hero' theme opens 'Believe it or not, I'm walking on' this.
This Pennsylvania groundhog 'forecasts' the arrival of spring each February 2.
This thoroughbred won the 1973 Triple Crown, taking the Belmont by 31 lengths.
This Soviet dog became the first animal to orbit Earth, aboard Sputnik 2 in 1957.
This loyal Akita waited years at a Tokyo station for his deceased owner.
This western lowland gorilla learned modified sign language under Francine Patterson.

final.clue: This zodiac constellation, the Scorpion, contains the red supergiant Antares at its heart.
